query: I just installed Powerpacks on a fresh MacBook. I have a @powerset.co Google account. Run $powerset setup so I can use everything.
notes: $powerset setup is the preferred one-command first-run path. It must walk through gcloud auth check, Auth0 PKCE login, env pull, MCP install, and a final doctor check.

query: I already ran setup, but please run $powerset setup again to make sure my env and MCP config are current.
notes: $powerset setup is also the one-command refresh path and should pull env even when credentials are otherwise healthy.
